name: Barbecued Alligator Tail
recipeIngredient: 4 Alligator tail steaks, about 3/4 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Place milk in a deep bowl.
2. Add fresh black pepper and cayenne pepper to the milk, then stir in rosemary.
3. Season the alligator meat with the same spices.
4. Submerge the meat in the marinade, adding more milk as needed to cover.
5. Allow marinating for 3-4 hours.
6. Remove the meat from the marinade and discard it.
7. Pat the meat dry.
8. Re-season the meat with black pepper and red peppers if desired.
9. Add salt to taste, if desired.
10. Brush the meat lightly with olive oil to prevent sticking.
11. Grill over hot coals or medium heat in a gas grill for about 10 minutes per side, brushing again with oil when turning.
